project_context.name: MunkerHex Studio
project_context.description: A render-tool-first mobile app for creating and applying animated Munker stripe optical illusions and CMY Hex grids over URL previews, paired with a retro arcade gallery redesigned in this additive complement style.

design_system.theme_archetype: Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) + Archetype 4 (Swiss Brutalist Dark Mode)

spacing_and_layout.grid: Use 1px solid borders for bento layouts. High density.

RenderStudio.description: Tool-first home screen. A large canvas previewing a URL, with bottom sheet controls for Munker overlays.

layout.header: Minimalist top bar with logo, hex toggle.
layout.canvas: Takes 60% of vertical space. Renders URL preview inside an iframe/WebView.
layout.controls: Bottom sheet (40%) with sliders for Tonal Ramp, Stripe Density, CMY tint.

HexPaletteGallery.description: A bento-grid gallery of retro games redesigned using the CMY Hex / Munker style.

layout.grid: Masonry or bento-style cards. Each card has a 1px border, stark contrast, and an image from the media section.

gallery_assets.description: Neon arcade numbers - use for Arcade Card
Vintage arcade joystick - use for Fighter/Platformer Card
Purple pink Hex grid - use for Puzzle/Maze Card background
Arcade room neon - general gallery header or hero

instructions_to_main_agent: Use NativeWind or standard StyleSheet for React Native.
Do NOT use HTML elements like div or span; use View, Text, Image, ScrollView.
Implement the UI with a strict Dark Tech/Brutalist feel: heavy 1px borders, deep black backgrounds, and neon CMY accents.

The Home screen must prioritize the Render Tool canvas. Build a fake or functional WebView preview for URLs with an overlay View that draws Munker stripes (repeating linear gradients or SVG lines) and Hex grids (SVG patterns).
Include 'testID' in React Native on all interactive elements as per the JSON (equivalent to data-testid).
All text should avoid default sans-serif (Inter/Roboto). Use a Monospace font family like 'SpaceMono' or 'JetBrainsMono' (load via Expo Google Fonts) for the tool/render vibe.
Ensure the bottom control sheet allows sliding or feels tactile.
Never use placeholder images; rely exclusively on the URLs provided in the media section.
